summary.en: Malaysia does not use a single EU-style horizontal RoHS-marking regime for all power tools as a market gate. Material obligations are handled through Malaysia-specific importer-linked routes and ST/SIRIM destination controls for in-scope categories.
summary.zh: 马来西亚未对所有电动工具实施欧盟式统一 RoHS 标识市场门槛。材料义务通常在马来西亚特定进口链和 ST/SIRIM 目的地控制路径中处理。
summary.zht: 馬來西亞未對所有電動工具實施歐盟式統一 RoHS 標識市場門檻。材料義務通常在馬來西亞特定進口鏈和 ST/SIRIM 目的地管控路徑中處理。

standards_or_laws: Malaysian importer-linked compliance workflow for regulated power tools

summary.en: China RoHS declarations and GB/T material evidence are useful technical inputs, but they do not alone complete Malaysia release expectations.
summary.zh: 中国 RoHS 声明与 GB/T 物料证据可作为技术输入，但单独并不能满足马来西亚放行要求。
summary.zht: 中國 RoHS 聲明與 GB/T 物料證據可作為技術輸入，但單獨不能滿足馬來西亞放行要求。

standards_or_laws: China RoHS declaration practice where used
GB/T material and GB/T 3883 tool documentation

gap.en: The gap is ownership and mapping. Chinese substance records are often technical-only, while Malaysia requires import-linked consistency and local release-file alignment with the responsible party and channel.
gap.zh: 差距是归属与映射。中国物质记录常止于技术层，而马来西亚要求与负责任主体与流通渠道挂钩的一致性及放行文件对齐。
gap.zht: 差距是歸屬與映射。中國物質記錄常止於技術層面，而馬來西亞要求與責任主體及通路掛鉤的一致性並與放行文件對齊。

mandatory_status.target: Contextual and pathway-dependent in Malaysia; no single EU-style mark is generally mandatory, but material consistency is required where the local control chain applies.
mandatory_status.cn: China RoHS and GB/T evidence is not sufficient as standalone Malaysia acceptance proof.
mandatory_status.zht: 中國 RoHS 與 GB/T 證據不足以作為馬來西亞單獨接受證明。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Not Malaysia-ready for materials-only conclusions; map substance evidence to Malaysian importer responsibilities and release workflow before entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应以材料数据结论直接判定马来西亚就绪；应将物质证据映射到马来西亚进口商责任与放行流程后再做判断。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應以材料數據結論直接判定馬來西亞就緒；應將物質證據映射到馬來西亞進口商責任與放行流程後再做判斷。

summary.en: Cordless tools should have battery handling explicitly covered by the Malaysia release package: designated in-country ownership, battery family coverage, and MCMC checks when the model has intentional wireless function.
summary.zh: 无绳工具应在马来西亚放行文件中明确电池处理范围，包括在地责任主体、电池系列覆盖，以及具有意无线功能型号的 MCMC 核验。
summary.zht: 無繩工具應在馬來西亞放行文件中明確電池處理範圍，包括在地責任主體、電池系列覆蓋，以及具有意無線功能型號的 MCMC 核驗。

standards_or_laws: Malaysia release and import workflows for cordless power tools
MCMC scope review for cordless models with intentional RF transmission
ST/SIRIM safety and release documentation requirements

summary.en: China files often bundle cordless battery coverage under GB/T 3883 and transport references (including UN transport where available), which helps technical review but does not replace Malaysia workflow mapping for import and channel responsibility.
summary.zh: 中国文件常把无绳电池覆盖到 GB/T 3883 与运输证据（含 UN 运输）中，利于技术审查，但不能替代马来西亚对进口和渠道责任的流程映射。
summary.zht: 中國文件常把無線電池覆蓋到 GB/T 3883 與運輸證據（含 UN 運輸）中，有助於技術審查，但不能取代馬來西亞對進口和通路責任的流程映射。

standards_or_laws: China lithium-battery transport evidence where applicable

gap.en: Battery risk is often addressed in test reports while lifecycle ownership and wireless-coupled MCMC scope are not explicitly linked to the Malaysia release route.
gap.zh: 电池风险往往在测试报告中出现，但生命周期归属与无线耦合的 MCMC 范围并未明确接入马来西亚放行路径。
gap.zht: 電池風險往往在測試報告中出現，但生命週期歸屬與無線耦合的 MCMC 範圍未明確接入馬來西亞放行路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional by scope: cordless battery handling must be mapped to importer responsibility, release workflow, and MCMC checks where wireless functions exist.
mandatory_status.cn: China battery records are not sufficient where Malaysia-specific importer and MCMC-linked scope must be demonstrated.
mandatory_status.zht: 中國電池資料不足以代替需展示馬來西亞特定進口商與 MCMC 關聯範圍的要求。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Not Malaysia-ready for cordless battery products until battery handling ownership and MCMC scope are documented in the Malaysian release package.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对无绳电池产品而言，在马来西亚放行文件中未明确电池处理归属及 MCMC 范围前，不能视为马来西亚就绪。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對無繩電池產品而言，在馬來西亞放行文件中未明確電池處理歸屬及 MCMC 範圍前，不能視為馬來西亞就緒。
